A recorded failure, surfaced honestly."] Error (String) , }

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " **Observational equivalence** of two results — the honest differential equality. Compares the"] # [doc = " *observable* (`repr + payload + guarantee` for a repr value; content-identity + guarantee for a"] # [doc = " datum), **excluding** dynamic `Meta` provenance. This mirrors the M-210 `ObservationalEquiv`"] # [doc = " checker and the existing three-way differential test (`crates/mycelium-l1/tests/differential.rs`),"] # [doc = " which compare on the observable, not full structural `Value`/`Meta` equality."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " This matters for honesty: the compiled backends (JIT/direct-LLVM) read a raw value back from"] # [doc = " native execution and stamp `Provenance::Root` (they carry no derivation chain), while the"] # [doc = " interpreter records a `Derived` provenance. A full `==` would flag that as a \"correctness"] # [doc = " divergence\" even though the *result* (repr+payload+guarantee) is identical — a **false** loss."] # [doc = " Provenance is dynamic metadata, explicitly excluded from content identity (RFC-0001 §4.6); a true"] # [doc = " correctness loss is a different repr/payload/datum or a weaker guarantee, which this does catch."] # [must_use] pub fn observable_eq (a : & CoreValue , b : & CoreValue) -> bool { match (a , b) { (CoreValue :: Repr (x) , CoreValue :: Repr (y)) => { x . repr () == y . repr () && x . payload () == y . payload () && x . meta () . guarantee () == y . meta () . guarantee () } (CoreValue :: Data (x) , CoreValue :: Data (y)) => { x . content_hash () == y . content_hash () && x . guarantee () == y . guarantee () } _ => false , } }
gaps.reason: method call `.repr(...)` has no proven-emitted free-fn referent in this file (neither a D4-mangled inherent `Type__repr` nor a bare inherent recorded by this file's left-to-right pass, nor a prim_map / combinator row). Emitting bare `repr(recv, …)` would fabricate an unknown prim and file-poison myc-check (G-β Rank A / G2/VR-5; residual when the method body itself gapped — e.g. M-1037 `.to_vec()` inside `read_to_end` — so the declaration was never registered)

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Map a direct-LLVM/JIT [`AotError`] onto a never-silent [`Outcome`]: a toolchain absence is a"] # [doc = " graceful `Skipped`; an unsupported node/repr/prim is a `Unlowerable` capability loss; everything"] # [doc = " else (overflow, depth limit, compile/exec failure) is a recorded `Error`."] fn classify_aot_error (e : & AotError) -> Outcome { match e { AotError :: ToolchainMissing (tool) => { Outcome :: Skipped (format ! ("native toolchain absent ({tool})")) } AotError :: UnsupportedRepr (_) | AotError :: UnsupportedPrim (_) | AotError :: UnsupportedNode (_) | AotError :: UnsupportedScheme (_) => Outcome :: Unlowerable (e . to_string ()) , _ => Outcome :: Error (e . to_string ()) , } }

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " A **warm runner**: a backend prepared so its *per-run* cost can be timed honestly, separating any"] # [doc = " one-time setup (a compile) from the repeated execution. For the compiled backends this compiles"] # [doc = " the artifact **once** (recording the one-time compile nanoseconds), then the closure times only"] # [doc = " `.run()`/`.call()` — so the timed figure is per-invocation, not per-compile (otherwise a \"loss\""] # [doc = " would be wrongly attributed to compile cost). For the in-process backends the closure just re-runs"] # [doc = " the evaluator."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The `probe` is the outcome of the first warm run (value / skip / unlowerable / error) — used for"] # [doc = " the differential + verdict category; `run` repeats the warm execution for timing (cloned via the"] # [doc = " boxed closure). `compile_ns` is the one-time setup cost when one applied."] pub struct WarmRun { # [doc = " The probe outcome (the first warm execution's result)."] pub probe : Outcome , # [doc = " The repeatable warm-execution closure (times only the run, not any compile). `None` when the"] # [doc = " probe was not a value (nothing to time)."] pub run : Option < Box < dyn Fn () -> Outcome > > , # [doc = " The one-time setup (compile) cost in nanoseconds, when a compile happened (compiled backends)."] pub compile_ns : Option < f64 > , }

(probe , Outcome :: Value (_)) . then_some (run) ; Self { probe , run , compile_ns : None , } } fn not_timed (probe : Outcome , compile_ns : Option < f64 >) -> Self { Self { probe , run : None , compile_ns , } } }

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Build a [`WarmRun`] for one backend on one node — the compile-once/run-many split that makes the"] # [doc = " per-run timing honest."] # [must_use] pub fn warm_runner (backend : Backend , node : & Node , eng : & Engines) -> WarmRun { match backend { Backend :: Interp => { let probe = run_interp (node , eng) ; let n = node . clone () ; let interp = Interpreter :: new (PrimRegistry :: with_builtins () , Box :: new (BinaryTernarySwapEngine) ,) ; WarmRun :: in_process (probe , Box :: new (move | | match interp . eval_core (& n) { Ok (v) => Outcome :: value_outcome (v) , Err (e) => Outcome :: Error (e . to_string ()) , }) ,) } Backend :: AotEnv => { let probe = run_aot_env (node , eng) ; let n = node . clone () ; let owned = Engines :: default () ; WarmRun :: in_process (probe , Box :: new (move | | run_aot_env (& n , & owned))) } Backend :: Jit => warm_jit (node) , Backend :: DirectLlvm => warm_direct_llvm (node) , Backend :: MlirDialect => warm_mlir_dialect (node) , } }

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " JIT: `compile_so` once (timed), then time `artifact.call()` (in-process `dlopen`ed `.so`)."] fn warm_jit (node : & Node) -> WarmRun { use std :: rc :: Rc ; use std :: time :: Instant ; let t = Instant :: now () ; match mycelium_mlir :: compile_so (node) { Ok (artifact) => { # [allow (clippy :: cast_precision_loss)] let compile_ns = t . elapsed () . as_nanos () as f64 ; let probe = match artifact . call () { Ok (v) => Outcome :: value_outcome (CoreValue :: Repr (v)) , Err (e) => classify_aot_error (& e) , } ; let art = Rc :: new (artifact) ; let run : Box < dyn Fn () -> Outcome > = { let art = Rc :: clone (& art) ; Box :: new (move | | match art . call () { Ok (v) => Outcome :: value_outcome (CoreValue :: Repr (v)) , Err (e) => classify_aot_error (& e) , }) } ; let mut w = WarmRun :: in_process (probe , run) ; w . compile_ns = Some (compile_ns) ; w } Err (e) => WarmRun :: not_timed (classify_aot_error (& e) , None) , } }

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Direct-LLVM: `compile` once (timed), then time `artifact.run()` (native artifact exec per call —"] # [doc = " process-spawn-bound, captioned as such in the report)."] fn warm_direct_llvm (node : & Node) -> WarmRun { use std :: rc :: Rc ; use std :: time :: Instant ; let t = Instant :: now () ; match mycelium_mlir :: compile (node) { Ok (artifact) => { # [allow (clippy :: cast_precision_loss)] let compile_ns = t . elapsed () . as_nanos () as f64 ; let probe = match artifact . run () { Ok (v) => Outcome :: value_outcome (CoreValue :: Repr (v)) , Err (e) => classify_aot_error (& e) , } ; let art = Rc :: new (artifact) ; let run : Box < dyn Fn () -> Outcome > = { let art = Rc :: clone (& art) ; Box :: new (move | | match art . run () { Ok (v) => Outcome :: value_outcome (CoreValue :: Repr (v)) , Err (e) => classify_aot_error (& e) , }) } ; let mut w = WarmRun :: in_process (probe , run) ; w . compile_ns = Some (compile_ns) ; w } Err (e) => WarmRun :: not_timed (classify_aot_error (& e) , None) , } }
